overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The character travels from a covered sidewalk under an elevated highway, through a major intersection with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, and into narrower urban streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large purple holographic billboard displaying a woman's face above the street
massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning the street
red arrow-shaped warning lights mounted on the overpass structure
large arched window with horizontal blinds on the building facade
tall building with reflective glass windows illuminated from within

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway in a futuristic cyberpunk city. Neon signs including a prominent purple holographic billboard illuminate the left side, while futuristic vehicles pass on the right. The atmosphere is dense with urban infrastructure and glowing advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open intersection, revealing the massive cityscape
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements above

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while looking up at the towering buildings and holographic displays

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
large vertical holographic billboard displaying a man's face with text
tall palm tree situated on the median between road lanes
bright cyan neon sign with Asian characters on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a vast open intersection surrounded by colossal skyscrapers. The camera tilts up to reveal the Arasaka tower and massive holographic advertisements floating above the street. Palm trees and neon signage line the road as the character approaches the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with heavy traffic

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane road
black luxury vehicle and red car pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide intersection through dense pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: black futuristic luxury sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large building-sized mural depicting a decorative sugar skull with floral patterns
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
curved elevated highway ramp structure with support beams

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the busy intersection filled with pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. A prominent sugar skull mural covers the building wall on the left as traffic flows through the crosswalk. The character navigates through the crowd while neon lights reflect off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street between high-rise buildings

events.description: turns right off the main road into a narrower street between buildings

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrower side street and continuing forward past storefronts

entered.detail: opening between buildings leading into a narrower urban corridor
illuminated shop windows and commercial displays at street level
tall modern street lamp with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The character turns off the main intersection into a narrower commercial street. The sugar skull mural recedes into the background as storefront displays and street lamps line the new path. The environment becomes more enclosed as buildings rise on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow street passing various shop fronts and neon signs

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying product images
ground floor commercial windows with illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the narrow urban street, passing by illuminated shop windows and digital billboards. The crowd thins out in this narrower corridor, with neon signs providing the primary lighting. The street extends forward between tall building facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban underpass into a vast, towering city intersection. It begins with the character walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where purple holographic billboards and passing futuristic vehicles create a dense atmosphere of glowing infrastructure. As the character moves forward, the oppressive ceiling of the overpass gives way to an expansive open plaza surrounded by colossal skyscrapers. The camera then tilts upward to reveal the imposing Arasaka tower and massive floating advertisements that dominate the skyline. The scene finally opens fully onto the wide road, passing neon signage and palm trees as the character approaches a busy crosswalk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, wide-open city intersection into the enclosed atmosphere of a narrow commercial corridor. It begins with the character navigating a crowded crosswalk amidst futuristic vehicles, where neon lights reflect off wet pavement and a large sugar skull mural dominates the left wall. As the character turns away from the main intersection, the mural recedes and the open space shifts into a tighter street lined with glowing storefront displays and street lamps. The scene then narrows further as the crowd thins, leaving the character to move between towering building facades illuminated by digital billboards and flickering neon signs.
